key_evidence: Tisza/Magyar defeated Fidesz April 12 with two-thirds majority — most significant EU democratic transition since 2010
Magyar government took office May 9 with explicit rule-of-law restoration mandate
27 EU supermilestones, EPPO accession, PM term limits, Sovereignty Protection Office abolition committed
Conservative anchoring (announced not yet enacted) — May 27/31 milestones will test follow-through
Canonical positive-evidence test case for symmetric-evaluation methodology
